title: Full Service Event Production

seo.title: Event Production Services — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides full-service event production including planning, logistics, AV equipment sourcing, tour and production management, venue sourcing, permit submittal, and on-site labor.

og.title: Full Service Event Production — BEATROX
og.description: From first concept to final strike — Beatrox manages every layer of your event including AV, logistics, labor, venue, and production management.

hero.headline: Full Service Event Production
hero.subheadline: From first concept to final strike, we manage every layer of your event — so you can focus on your audience.

capabilities: Labor Hire Roles: TD, PM, A1/A2, V1/V2, L1/L2

body.content: Beatrox is a full-service event production partner. Whether you're producing a brand activation, a touring concert, an experiential pop-up, or a corporate event, our team handles everything — from pre-production planning to on-site technical direction and final strike.

body.heading: What We Handle
body.content: Our production team serves as your single point of contact, managing AV equipment sourcing and rentals, venue coordination, labor hiring, permit submittal, and day-of execution. We have deep experience with complex logistics across multiple formats and venue types, and we bring a seasoned network of production professionals to every project.
